name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_FUNCTION_3Y
description: Top assignees by functional category last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In the last three years, within target-pair combinations related to the �� category, which companies published the most patents?
In the last three years, within target-pair combinations related to the Disease_Tissue / Cell Surface Anchor category, which companies published the most patents?
In the last three years, within target-pair combinations related to the Immunostimulatory_Context category, which companies published the most patents?
